steps.title: Find the median position
steps.content:
Each data set has $11$ values. The median is the middle value, which is the $6$th value.
$$\frac{11+1}{2}=6$$

steps.title: Compare the middle values
steps.content: Data set A has $8$ as its $6$th value. Data set B also has $8$ as its $6$th value. Therefore both medians are $8$.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: The calculator median check gives the same value for data set A.

steps.title: Second calculator check
steps.content: The second list confirms the median of data set B is also $8$, so the medians are equal. The answer is C.
